image_prompt.scene: Grand tournament arena filled with hundreds of disciples, a massive stone platform in the center, two young swordsmen facing each other in final duel position, banners of the sect fluttering in the wind, tension crackling in the air.

video_prompt.action: Two swordsmen clash in an intense duel, blades spark upon contact, one with a green-tinged sword the other with an ice-crystal sword, dust rising from the stone platform, the crowd gasping with each exchange.
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Clashing steel, crowd murmuring then cheering, flags snapping in the wind
